meaning: n.急速上升,陡直上升,图象电子放大,缩放,嗡嗡声vi.突然扩大,急速上升,摄象机移动vt.使摄象机移动
examples: This lightweight zoom camera will fit comfortably into a fanny pack or coat pocket.
Your camcorder should have these basic features: autofocus, playback facility, zoom lens.
Most parents would probably prefer a vehicle to zoom between school and piano lessons.
Today, first-class observation cars with panoramic windows let leaf-peeping tourists zoom through the hill country in one day.
Other features were basic: a 2x digital zoom, self-timer and standard and night shooting modes.
